design_philosophy.identity: E1 - Organic Modernism meets Vibrant Wellness
core_principles: Fusion: Botanical aesthetics mixed with high-conversion e-commerce layouts
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a 'deep breath'
Content is King: The copy guides the user through a journey of relief
Zoom In: High-fidelity textures for digital products to make them feel physical
Negative Space: Luxurious padding to prevent cognitive overload
anti_patterns: Generic center-aligned hero sections without visual weight

typography.usage_rules: Headings must be Playfair Display. Use italics for emphasis in headings to create an editorial look. Body text must be Manrope for maximum readability. Use Caveat for 'human touches' like annotations or testimonials.

gradients.bundle_mesh: background: radial-gradient(at top left, #E9C46A 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at bottom right, #E76F51 0%, transparent 50%)

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy. Avoid equal-sized cards for everything. Mix tall, wide, and square cards to create visual interest.

hero.style: Split layout or Centered with massive typography. Must use a 'Sunlight' glow effect behind the main image.
hero.content: Headline: 'Reclaim Your Calm'. Subhead: 'A curated collection of tools for anxiety relief and mindfulness.' CTA: 'Get the Bundle'.

product_card.style: Clean, high-padding card with a colored background tint (subtle) corresponding to the product type. Hover: Lift and shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-primary/20 text-primary hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle SVG noise filter overlay on the background (opacity 0.03) to simulate paper.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for cards. shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgb(0,0,0,0.1)] for floating images.

effects: Parallax effect on background botanical elements
Slow breathing animation (scale 1 to 1.02) for the 'Calm' hero image

images.guidelines: All images must feel 'warm', 'morning light', and 'authentic'. Avoid generic corporate stock.

universal_guidelines: Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use Playfair Display.
For shadows, use colored shadows (e.g. shadow-green-900/10) to avoid muddy grays.
